caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold lettering, and over-ear headphones is seated behind a desk. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with five stars and the word "HUSTLE." To his right is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black container with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD." Above him, a blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is turned toward someone off-screen to his right, speaking with an open mouth and an expressive facial expression. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and continues speaking, with only slight changes in his head angle and facial movements as he talks.
